Off Calendar Apr-13-2007 Text Ruling

Off Calendar Apr-13-2007 Text Ruling

Motion To Invalidate Assignment To Heir Hunter Pursuant To Probate Code Section 11604(B) And Section 11604.5(G); Memorandum Of Points And Authrorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Alexandera Atencio appearing for moving parties. Laura Woodward appearing for assignee Kemp & Associates. Oral arguments presented by both counsel. Matter submitted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Guitron.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Mayo (Counsel for Gregory Long, Personal Representative); David Baer (Counsel for Michael Solaric, Alan Wayne Severdia, Mary Wohlgemuth, and Natalie Abboud); Laura Woodward (Counsel for Kemp & Associates, assignee of Michael Solaric, Alan Wayne Severdia, Mary Wohlgemuth, and Natalie Abboud).

Procedural Note: Although the matter had been pre-granted, counsel appeared to object.

Counsel and the Court discussed at some length the best manner in which to proceed with the distribution in light of the contested claim by Kemp & Associates as to its claimed 1/3 interest by assignment in the estate. Rather than delay the entire distribution, the Court ordered that the distribution to the unaffected beneficiaries proceed as proposed in the Petition and that the contested one-third interest of Michael Solaric, Alan Wayne Severdia, Mary Wohlgemuth, and Natalie Abboud be deposited with the Court pending resolution of the claim. The Court also ordered the bond increased to a total of $3,600,000.00.

A proposed Order was submitted and reviewed after the calendar. The Order, as revised, was thereafter signed by the Court on the same day.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.
